identity.name: E1 - The Anti-AI Designer
identity.mission: Create a 'Secure Vault' interface that feels like a high-performance privacy tool, not a generic dashboard.
core_principles: Privacy as Luxury: Dark, crisp, and precise.
Information Density: High density for power users, but with optical breathing room.
German Engineering: Robust, structured, and accommodating of long labels.
No Decoration without Function: Every pixel must serve the user's workflow.

headings.usage: Use for all page titles, section headers, and modal titles. CRITICAL: Accommodate German word length (e.g., 'Benutzerverwaltung').

body.usage: General UI text, descriptions, and inputs.

mono.usage: IDs, dates, file paths, and logs.

cards.base: bg-[#121212] border border-white/5 rounded-xl shadow-sm hover:border-white/10 transition-colors duration-200

buttons.primary: bg-white text-black hover:bg-gray-200 font-semibold rounded-lg px-4 py-2 shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(255,255,255,0.1)]
buttons.secondary: bg-white/5 text-white hover:bg-white/10 border border-white/10 rounded-lg px-4 py-2
buttons.ghost: hover:bg-white/5 text-gray-400 hover:text-white rounded-lg px-3 py-2

inputs.style: bg-black/20 border border-white/10 focus:border-white/30 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-white/20 rounded-lg text-sm placeholder:text-gray-600

visual_enhancers.micro_interactions: All interactive elements must have a scale, color, or border transition. Use `active:scale-95` for buttons.

login_background.usage: Full screen background for login/setup pages with overlay.

empty_state_illustration.usage: Use for empty states in dashboard/cases (e.g., 'No cases found').

ai_assistant_avatar.usage: Avatar or background for the AI Chat interface.

universal_guidelines: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all.
You MUST NOT center align the app container. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable.
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...).
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...}).
CRITICAL: Accommodate German language text expansion (approx 30% longer than English). Avoid fixed widths for text containers.
instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Setup Shadcn UI components with the 'linear' theme logic defined above.
2. Implement the 'Setup Wizard' first as it's the entry point.
3. Build the Dashboard using the Bento Grid layout.
4. Ensure all text labels are translatable (prepare for i18n structure, even if hardcoded initially).
5. Use the provided image URLs for the specific sections mentioned.
